en:
Your trusted partner for cultural experiences in Paris.

1. Who We Are

Szilkatours s. r. o. is a dedicated tourism service provider specializing in making world-class cultural landmarks accessible to travelers worldwide. We focus on providing seamless access to the most iconic monuments in France, combining modern technology with personalized customer care.

Official Business Name: Szilkatours s. r. o.

Year Founded: 2024

Location: Komárno, Slovak Republic

2. What We Do

We provide a comprehensive ticketing service that includes guaranteed entrance to the Louvre Museum and the Palace of Versailles. Our services are designed in plain language: we take the complexity out of booking nominative tickets and time slots.

Our primary areas of expertise are:

  • Ticket management and secure reservation processing.
  • Digital E-Guide production, providing historical and artistic context for your visit.
  • Personalized customer assistance for travelers navigating French cultural sites.

3. How We Serve People

We serve our customers by offering a "peace of mind" experience. We handle the technical and administrative details of monument entry, so our guests can focus on the art and history. By providing multi-language support and digital guides, we bridge the gap between foreign visitors and local heritage.

Our mission: Our goal is to make the world's most beautiful museums accessible, understandable, and easy to visit for everyone, regardless of their location or technical skills.

Official Contact Details
